CustomField.formula:
IF(ISBLANK( ShippingCity),0,1) + IF(ISBLANK( ShippingCountry ),0,1)+IF(ISBLANK( ShippingState ),0,1)+IF(ISBLANK( ShippingStreet ),0,1)+IF(ISBLANK( ShippingPostalCode ),0,1) +
IF( ISPICKVAL(Industry,""), 0,1) + IF(LEN(Phone) = 0, 0,1) + IF( ISPICKVAL( Laboratory_Type__c ,""), 0,1) +IF( ISBLANK( Name2__c ), 0,1) + IF(ISBLANK( Website ),0,1)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Profile completeness score depends on providing accurate information in the following fields Shipping Street Shipping City Shipping State Shipping Zip/PostalL Shipping Country Phone Industry Laboratory Type Department Website
CustomField.label: Profile Completeness Score
